name: 05_metrics_single_contract_transport_dev_transport_tsrc_uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_jobs
statement:
SELECT
  'contract' AS table_family,
  'transport_dev' AS catalog_name,
  'transport_tsrc' AS schema_name,
  'uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_jobs' AS table_name,
  'VIEW' AS table_type,
  COUNT(*) AS row_count,
  COUNT(*) > 0 AS has_rows,
  GREATEST(MAX(try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP)), MAX(try_cast(`Total_Down_Time_Hrs` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS latest_observed_ts,
  LEAST(MIN(try_cast(`createddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`duedate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate_time` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`createddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`duedate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completeddate` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`completedstatus` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Date` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`DateKey` AS TIMESTAMP)), MIN(try_cast(`Total_Down_Time_Hrs` AS TIMESTAMP))) AS earliest_observed_ts,
  'createddate_time|duedate_time|completeddate_time|createddate|duedate|completeddate|completedstatus|Date|DateKey|Total_Down_Time_Hrs' AS freshness_columns
FROM `transport_dev`.`transport_tsrc`.`uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_jobs`

error.message:
[INSUFFICIENT_PERMISSIONS] Insufficient privileges:
Table 'uvw_kpi_7_to_14_its_jobs' does not have sufficient privilege to execute because the owner of one of the underlying resources failed an authorization check. SQLSTATE: 42501
